LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussRifle.label: gauss rifle
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussRifle.description: A powerful mass driver rifle utilizing magnetic acceleration to launch ferromagnetic sabots. The incredible velocity and specialized ammunition allow it to completely negate most forms of conventional armor.
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussRifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussRifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussRifle.verbs.0.label: low power shot
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussRifle.verbs.1.label: high power shot
LanguageData.VWE_Bullet_GaussRifle_LowPower.label: gauss rifle sabot
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussMagnum.label: gauss revolver
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussMagnum.description: A powerful mass driver pistol utilizing magnetic acceleration to launch ferromagnetic sabots. The incredible velocity and specialized ammunition allow it to completely negate most forms of conventional armor.
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussMagnum.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussMagnum.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussMagnum.verbs.0.label: low power shot
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussMagnum.verbs.1.label: high power shot
LanguageData.VWE_Bullet_GaussMagnum_LowPower.label: gauss revolver sabot
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussLance.label: gauss lance
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussLance.description: A powerful, long range mass driver lance utilizing magnetic acceleration to launch ferromagnetic sabots. The incredible velocity and specialized ammunition allow it to completely negate most forms of conventional armor.
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussLance.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussLance.verbs.0.label: low power shot
LanguageData.VWE_Gun_GaussLance.verbs.1.label: high power shot
LanguageData.VWE_Bullet_GaussLance_LowPower.label: gauss lance sabot
